name: Sino Prosper (Group) Holdings Limited
summary: Sino Prosper (Group) Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, invests in energy and natural resources related projects in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Investment in Energy and Natural Resources Related Projects, Money Lending, and Food and Beverage segments. The company holds interests in the Aohan Qi gold mine located in Inner Mongolia; and the Heilongjiang project. It also provides loan financing, and investment and management consultation services. In addition, the company imports, distributes, and sells food and beverage products. Further, it is involved in the provision of administrative, investment, management, mining consultation, and micro-financing services; and exploration and mining of gold. The company was formerly known as Sino Prosper State Gold Resources Holdings Limited and changed its name to Sino Prosper (Group) Holdings Limited in January 2014. Sino Prosper (Group) Holdings Limited is headquartered in Admiralty, Hong Kong.
